ddls:
CREATE TABLE "specimens" (
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specimen */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the specimen was collected */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the specimen was collected */,
  "locality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the locality where the specimen was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the specimen was collected or stocked */,
  "huc_number" REAL /* Hydrologic Unit Code (HUC) number of the collection site */,
  "drainage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drainage system where the specimen was collected */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the specimen (e.g., stocked, collected, introduced) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the specimen was collected */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collector who collected the specimen */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species of the specimen */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the specimen in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the specimen in grams */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the specimen */,
  "morphometric_data" TEXT /* Morphometric data (e.g., girth, fin length) */,
  "diet_analysis" TEXT /* Diet analysis */,
  "genetic_analysis" TEXT /* Genetic analysis */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of photo taken during collection */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for collection */,
  "gear_type" TEXT /* Type of gear used for collection */,
  "water_quality_data" TEXT /* Water quality data at the time of collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_locality_id FOREIGN KEY ("locality_id") REFERENCES localities ("locality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES status_types ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_drainage_id FOREIGN KEY ("drainage_id") REFERENCES drainages ("drainage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES collectors ("collector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the state belongs to (e.g., Northeast, Southeast) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the county belongs to */,
  "county_fips" TEXT /* Federal Information Processing Standard (FIPS) code for the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "localities" (
  "locality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each locality */,
  "locality_name" TEXT /* Name of the locality */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the locality belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the locality */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the locality */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the locality */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the locality */,
  "substrate_type" TEXT /* Type of substrate at the locality */,
  "water_body_type" TEXT /* Type of water body (e.g., river, lake, stream) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("locality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_localities_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drainages" (
  "drainage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drainage system */,
  "drainage_name" TEXT /* Name of the drainage system */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the drainage system belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drainage system */,
  "drainage_area" REAL /* Area of the drainage system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drainage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drainages_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_types" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status type */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collectors" (
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collector */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the collector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the collector */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collector (e.g., field researcher, data analyst) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Collector's affiliation (e.g., university, research institution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Full name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family the species belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "habitat_description" TEXT /* Description of the species' habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator leading the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "project_objectives" TEXT /* Objectives of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES principal_investigators ("pi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principal_investigators" (
  "pi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal investigator */,
  "pi_name" TEXT /* Full name of the principal investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal investigator */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the principal investigator is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the principal investigator belongs to */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_specimens" (
  "project_specimen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-specimen link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role the specimen plays in the project (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role the specimen plays in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_specimens_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_specimens_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the specimen */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the specimen was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
